warning: This registry documents intended command and conversation topology. It is not an authorization grant and is not enforced by the current seat.message or Captain officer.order implementations.

status_vocabulary.as_built_legacy: A legacy route has durable runtime evidence, but is not the final locked-officer route.
status_vocabulary.configured_not_executed: An endpoint or route is named, but delivery and execution are not proven.
status_vocabulary.target_design_not_enforced: The route is part of the target organization and is not runtime-enforced.
status_vocabulary.needs_normalization: Sources disagree or leave the route underspecified; do not infer authority.
status_vocabulary.unverified: Evidence is insufficient to claim the route works.

default_policy.sibling_contact: Route through no1.pm unless a route is explicitly listed here.
default_policy.authority: A route permits only the named purpose. It does not enlarge either seat's commission.
default_policy.queue_semantics: Queued is not delivered, working, reported, accepted, or complete.
current_gap: ship/bridge-harness/src/schemas.mjs accepts an arbitrary string in seat.message.to
ship/bridge-harness/src/typed-tools.mjs appends seat.message without checking an adjacency allowlist
ship/captain-harness/src/tools.mjs exposes officer.order over every configured officer endpoint

personal_staff_routes.purpose: Immediate, iterative cognition and decision support
Records, research, scheduling, Brain operations, and bounded administration
personal_staff_routes.command_authority: officer directs only the officer-scoped PA office
officer directs only the officer-scoped engineering cell

routes.purpose: Authenticated priorities, standing missions, grants, above-Captain calls, and flag reporting
routes.command_authority: Commodore commands Captain

routes.purpose: Ship execution routing, department command, board truth, and integrated reporting
routes.command_authority: Captain commands No1

routes.purpose: Direct consultation and override; ordinary Science tasking remains through No1
routes.command_authority: No1 is ordinary tasking authority; Captain has direct consult and override

routes.purpose: Mind-health intervention and urgent cognitive-integrity matters
routes.command_authority: No1 retains ordinary departmental routing

routes.purpose: Whole-surface monitoring alerts, drift, defects, degradation, and waste
routes.command_authority: none; CMO reports and Captain decides

routes.purpose: Security, custody, privilege, quarantine, and rogue-watch alerts
routes.command_authority: none; Security reports and Captain decides

routes.purpose: Direct reconnaissance consultation when the Captain explicitly calls the seat
routes.command_authority: ordinary Intelligence tasking remains through No1

routes.purpose: Ship-scale engineering relationship and factory work initiation
routes.command_authority: Captain commands Chief Engineer; No1 routing needs explicit normalization

routes.purpose: Ordinary Science tasking and evidence-report return
routes.command_authority: No1 tasks Science; Captain adjudicates ship action

routes.purpose: Reconnaissance commissions and intelligence reports
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department under Captain

routes.purpose: Routine security work, grants, custody, and remediation routing
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department; alerts bypass to Captain

routes.purpose: Resource, budget, server, key, and operating-cadence work
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department; Captain owns resource decisions within grants

routes.purpose: Crafted human-facing external communication and final review
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department

routes.purpose: Mission tactics and earning-opportunity development
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department; Captain chooses among options

routes.purpose: Routine intervention work, cognitive-integrity findings, and remediation routing
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department; Captain retains direct intervention line

routes.purpose: Monitoring work and remediation routing
routes.command_authority: No1 runs the department; alerts bypass to Captain

routes.purpose: Translate routed ship needs into a logged factory commission
routes.command_authority: Relationship to Captain's direct Chief Engineer line needs normalization

routes.purpose: Privilege check, credential issue or revocation, budget allocation, and quarantine
routes.command_authority: Neither seat commands the other; each owns one stage of the flow

routes.purpose: Legacy promotion-candidate and cognitive-integrity handoff
routes.command_authority: none

routes.purpose: Logged external factory commission, evidence return, and candidate handoff
routes.command_authority: Incubator PM controls factory decomposition and execution
